title: Clean Connected Glass(DiagonalWindows Patch)
description: This pack makes vanilla glass panes work with DiagonalWindows—load it above both required packs.
body:
This resource pack makes Clean_Connected_Glass textures compatible with the DiagonalWindows mod. As my time is limited, it currently only supports vanilla clear and stained glass panes.
Place it above both the glass_pane_culling pack and the Clean_Connected_Glass pack or it will not work.

中文
这是一个让链接纹理包(Clean_Connected_Glass)和(DiagonalWindows mod)相互兼容的材质包,因为我的精力有限,目前只兼容了原版的透明玻璃板和彩色玻璃板
请将它放置于glass_pane_culling纹理包和Clean_Connected_Glass纹理包之上,否则不起作用
![Glass pan](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eb438d534b284217767b894fdb79e1f0777ec164_0.webp)
